chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S-162 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 04-12-2025 None present for the appellant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, APG. **** None present for the appellant; no intimation is received. Even on the last two consecutive dates of hearing, none was in attendance on behalf of the appellant, which reflects that the appellant and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing this matter. Resultantly, the instant Crl. Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
